rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL
content_words: pre-call constraint + in-call execute + post-call rollback

results.title: Deterministic vs Probabilistic Guards for AI Agent Tool Calls
results.note: Full pre/in/post pipeline with rollback and drift detection is functionally close but described as a single middleware layer, NOT a 3-role specialised multi-agent split with strict role boundaries; lacks role-specialisation across distinct agents.

results.title: AgentSpec Customizable Runtime Enforcement (2025/03)
results.note: Single-role runtime enforcement with triggers/predicates/boundaries; no 3-role split, no temporal sequencing across multiple agents.

results.title: ProbGuard Probabilistic Runtime Monitoring (2025/08)
results.note: DTMC-based monitoring with pre-violation intervention only; lacks 3-role split, no post-call containment agent, no executor/constrainer separation.

results.title: SafeAgent Runtime Protection Architecture (2026)
results.note: Tool-dependency graph + constrained traversal; single architectural mechanism, not three-role boundary protocol.

results.title: Architecting Resilient LLM Agents Secure Plan-to-Execute (2025/09)
results.note: P-t-E with containment + pre-approved plans + sandboxes; has containment notion but not three role-specialised agents with strict boundaries and temporal pre/in/post split.

results.title: Multi-Agent Debate Critic-Defender-Judge Safety Eval (2025/11)
results.note: Three-role debate (Critic/Defender/Judge) but OPINION-LEVEL debate, not tool-call lifecycle with temporal sequencing (pre/in/post). The candidate's novelty claim explicitly distinguishes this; functionally different mechanism.

results.title: Multi-Agent System Patterns Unified Guide
results.note: Capability-based routing with specialisation boundaries; lacks specific 3-role executor/constrainer/containment pre/in/post temporal sequencing on tool-call lifecycle.

results.title: VeriMAP Verification-Aware Planning for MAS
results.note: Task decomposition with verification functions; no 3-role specialised tool-call protocol with strict boundaries and pre/in/post temporal split.
